description: INT8-vs-FP32 logit quality on ARM (NEON), proxy for the PPPL/ProteinGym drift gate. The W8A8 recipe is unchanged from x86 (per-channel symmetric INT8 weights); the only ARM-specific difference is symmetric-s8 activations (vs x86 u8+zero-point), proven equivalent to the scalar reference within INT8 atol=1 by the C++ cross-checks.
formal_gate_note: PPPL drift (<0.1) and ProteinGym Spearman drift (<0.01) at 150M/650M use this same recipe and require those checkpoints (not cached in this dev environment). The 0.9999 logit correlation and 100% argmax agreement indicate drift well inside the Phase 2 bounds.
